hero.title: Right Talent.
hero.description: We provide the right talent with the right skills — either newly hired or transitioned from existing rolls — to fit your operational needs. Our team manages end-to-end deployment, payroll administration, and statutory/regulatory compliance so you can focus on core business.
hero.highlight: Clear roles, KPIs, and safety practices ensure consistent performance and reliability across sites.

offerings.title: Recruitment Support
offerings.description: Skilled, semi-skilled, technical and non-technical roles sourced and screened.

offerings.title: Onboarding
offerings.description: BGV, documentation, induction, and site readiness for every new hire.

offerings.title: Payroll & Benefits
offerings.description: Accurate payroll processing, statutory deductions, and benefits administration.

offerings.title: MIS Reports
offerings.description: Timely performance and compliance dashboards for complete client visibility.
